Company Name in QB: OceanSky America Inc. dba HONG KONG MARKET

Company Description: Hong Kong-based company (former name of HBL LIMITED). Private company involved in international trade and distribution. Import/export operations for textiles and printing products.
Product Types: Paper labels, printed labels, woven labels, heat transfer products, special woven fabrics, tufted textile fabrics, lace, tapestries, trimmings, embroidery, printed materials, base metal products.
Product Complexity: Medium - International import/export distribution requiring customs compliance, multi-product catalog management, global logistics coordination.
